title: One of Our Spies Is Missing
writer: Howard Rodman, Sam Rolfe, Henry Slesar
actors: Robert Vaughn, David McCallum, Leo G. Carroll
plot: U.N.C.L.E. agents Napoleon Solo and Illya Kuryakin are sent to Europe where a scientist's age-reversing machine is in danger of being seized by T.H.R.U.S.H. spies.
